Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	In Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire you battle through the usual eight gyms before taking on the Elite Four. Unlike recent games, in OR/AS the Elite Four must be completed in order, like the original Ruby/Sapphire.

### Gym Leaders
[Roxanne](#gym-1) (Rustboro City)[Brawly](#gym-2) (Dewford Town)[Wattson](#gym-3) (Mauville City)[Flannery](#gym-4) (Lavaridge Town)[Norman](#gym-5) (Petalburg City)[Winona](#gym-6) (Fortree City)[Liza & Tate](#gym-7) (Mossdeep City)[Wallace](#gym-8) (Sootopolis City)
### Elite Four
[Sidney](#elite4-1)[Phoebe](#elite4-2)[Glacia](#elite4-3)[Drake](#elite4-4)[Steven](#champion-5)
